Blockers: v2.10.2 ships without Go kernel binaries (#1316 - P1), swarm P0 #1186 now 5th+ cycle no human action, Codex+Copilot CBs OPEN 52% blocked (#1335), bootstrap invariant false-positive cascade (5+ issues: #1254/#1325/#1332/#1341/#1347), conference demo risk - Copilot events 0 in API (#1342). Sprint transition: KE-3 now active (#1316/#1341/#1325/#1332/#1322). Version: cloud 2.10.1 (1 minor behind 2.10.2).

dogfoodPatterns.pattern: Bootstrap invariant false-positive cascade — 5+ issues in 2 days
dogfoodPatterns.description: The no-governance-self-modification invariant is triggering on legitimate bootstrap operations: (1) mkdir .agentguard in fresh worktrees, (2) EM state writes to .agentguard/squads/, (3) guide mode returning hard block instead of warn. Compounded by: rtk prefix breaks bootstrap allowlist pattern match (#1347) and pnpm symlink detection fails causing kernel absence (#1341). This is a compounding bootstrap reliability crisis across all driver types.
dogfoodPatterns.recommendation: KE-3 P0: (a) Scope invariant to .agentguard/{config,policy,hooks} only, (b) Fix guide-mode to warn not block, (c) Update claude-hook-wrapper allowlist to strip rtk prefix before pattern matching, (d) Change pnpm install check to test .modules.yaml not directory existence.

dogfoodPatterns.pattern: docker stop/rm blocked for named ephemeral test containers
dogfoodPatterns.description: QA smoke runner blocked on docker stop/rm for ephemeral test containers. Governance doesn't distinguish production from test containers.
dogfoodPatterns.recommendation: Allow docker stop/rm for containers matching test-naming patterns (*-test-*), or ops-role annotation.

crossCuttingIssues.title: v2.10.2 npm missing Go kernel binaries
crossCuttingIssues.description: Release tagged before Go module import fix (#1315) landed. Go binary build failed for v2.10.2. Published package falls back to TS kernel — loses 145x performance. v2.10.3 patch required.
crossCuttingIssues.action: KE-3: Cut v2.10.3 with Go kernel binaries

crossCuttingIssues.title: Swarm Health P0 — 5th+ cycle, no human action
crossCuttingIssues.description: 133 agents queued vs 32 max_workers. 18 dead PIDs. 5 consecutive cycles without resolution.
crossCuttingIssues.action: Human: git worktree prune, kill dead PIDs, verify worker capacity

crossCuttingIssues.title: Codex + Copilot circuit breakers OPEN — 52% swarm blocked
crossCuttingIssues.description: 68/132 enabled agents blocked. Quota exhausted for March. CB auto-resolves 2026-04-01.

crossCuttingIssues.title: Copilot event pipeline 0 events — conference demo gap
crossCuttingIssues.description: 0 copilot-tagged events in API (vs 364K total). May 6 conference demo requires live Copilot events. Linked to CB state — Copilot agents not running. Health check masks as 'verified'.
crossCuttingIssues.action: Should recover 2026-04-01 when CB resets. Also fix health check to surface PARTIAL state.

escalations.reason: Swarm #1186: 5th+ cycle. git worktree prune + PID cleanup required. 85.7% agents stuck.
Bootstrap invariant cascade (#1254/#1325/#1332/#1341/#1347): 5 issues in 2 days. Fix invariant scope, guide-mode, rtk allowlist, pnpm check.
Cut v2.10.3 — #1316 Go kernel binaries missing from 2.10.2. Users on TS fallback.
Copilot events 0 in API (#1342) — conference demo May 6 at risk. Verify recovery after 2026-04-01 CB reset.
Merge PR #1320 (docs sync v2.10.2, all green), close #1318, merge #1338 (Live Office README).
Skip v2.10.2, upgrade to v2.10.3 when available.
